title: RedTotem
description: This project adds a red totem which can help you see the totem in pvp
body:
Red Totem of Undying 🔴
A simple, clean recolor of the Totem of Undying — now in red.
No flashy changes, no over-the-top redesign. Just the classic totem you know, swapped to a crisp red palette. Perfect if you prefer a bold, unified look for your inventory or just want your totem to stand out a little more.
What's changed:

Totem texture recolored to red
Faithful to the original design — same shape, same style
Compatible with vanilla Minecraft

Works with: Java Edition 1.21.11 1.21 1.21.1
Resolution: 16x (vanilla)
